creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to alt2600 from comment #3)

Sorry, I cannot reproduce this error, neither as a port nor in poudriere, on 13.2 or on -CURRENT. This is an old port, and it emits a lot of warnings, but it builds fine even on -CURRENT and on recent hardware, and the packages are built in the compilation farm…

Surely something wrong on your machine, but I cannot see what.
